rows.correct_prompt:
You are an expert document designer tasked with creating a visual representation of a document.

**Follow these instructions carefully:**

1.  **Visual Style:** Adhere strictly to the following visual style description:
    "A clean, modern, and data-focused infographic template with a grid-based structure, featuring clearly defined sections for a main title, introductory text, multiple chart placeholders suitable for comparative data (such as bar or area charts), and a legend area, utilizing an earthy green and brown color palette with a contrasting muted teal or subtle orange accent for data emphasis and Open Sans text readability, all on a smooth, untextured background with subtle, stylized leaf or tree iconography integrated sparingly."

2.  **Text Content:** Render the following text content within the document. Ensure all text is legible, well-formatted, and logically arranged according to its inherent structure (titles, sections, lists, etc.).
    ```text
    THEME CONCEIVED (ID: 1366): Sports and Fitness
Document Type: Infographic/Chart - Weekly Fitness Progress Tracker (TYPE: Infographic/Chart - Weekly Fitness Progress Tracker)

Main Title: My Weekly Fitness Tracker

Introduction:
Track your efforts, celebrate wins! Monitor weekly fitness and stay motivated.

Section: Workouts This Week
- Log exercise type.
- Note duration/intensity.
- Aim for consistency.

Section: Nutrition & Hydration
- Record water intake.
- Note healthy meals.
- Monitor energy.

Conclusion:
Great work! Review progress, set goals for next week.
    ```

3.  **Output:** Generate a single image of this document

rows.correct_prompt:
You are an expert document designer tasked with creating a visual representation of a document.

**Follow these instructions carefully:**

1.  **Visual Style:** Adhere strictly to the following visual style description:
    "Clean and precise infographic template for an engineering process flow, grid-based layout with placeholders for geometric icons and short text descriptions, connected by sharp vector lines and arrows, industrial color palette of cool blues, greys, and a bright orange accent for flow, on a smooth light grey untextured background, embodying a modern, functional, and geometric aesthetic."

2.  **Text Content:** Render the following text content within the document. Ensure all text is legible, well-formatted, and logically arranged according to its inherent structure (titles, sections, lists, etc.).
    ```text
    — THEME CONCEIVED (ID: 223): Technology and Innovation
Document Type: Paper — White Paper on Quantum Computing Advancements (TYPE: Paper — White Paper on Quantum Computing Advancements) —

Main Title: Quantum Frontiers: Advancing Computational Power

Introduction:
Quantum computing is rapidly evolving, poised to revolutionize complex problem-solving across industries. This paper highlights key recent advancements and their potential impact.

Section: Enhanced Qubit Stability and Control
- Significant progress has been made in increasing qubit coherence times.
- Improved error correction codes are making quantum computations more reliable.
- These developments are crucial for building fault-tolerant quantum computers.

Section: Algorithmic Breakthroughs and Applications
- New quantum algorithms show promise for drug discovery and materials science.
- Optimization problems in finance and logistics are prime targets for quantum speedups.
- Early applications are emerging in machine learning and cryptography.

Conclusion:
The journey towards impactful quantum computing is accelerating, unlocking unprecedented capabilities for science and technology.
    ```

3.  **Output:** Generate a single image of this document

rows.correct_prompt:
You are an expert document designer tasked with creating a visual representation of a document.

**Follow these instructions carefully:**

1.  **Visual Style:** Adhere strictly to the following visual style description:
    "A highly professional legal brief cover page template, featuring a meticulously organized and centered layout on a crisp, untextured, high-quality white paper background, with distinct placeholder blocks for court identification, case caption, case number, document title, and counsel information, all formatted for classic serif typography in a strict black and white palette."

2.  **Text Content:** Render the following text content within the document. Ensure all text is legible, well-formatted, and logically arranged according to its inherent structure (titles, sections, lists, etc.).
    ```text
    THEME CONCEIVED (ID: 1212): Art and Design
Document Type: Poster - Exhibition Poster for a Modern Art Gallery Opening (TYPE: Poster - Exhibition Poster for a Modern Art Gallery Opening)

Main Title: Form & Flux

Introduction:
Nova Art Gallery proudly opens its doors! Experience our inaugural exhibition showcasing groundbreaking contemporary art that challenges perception and inspires dialogue.

Section: Featured Artists
- Discover the avant-garde works of Elara Vance, pushing sculptural boundaries.
- Explore the digital vistas and interactive installations by Kai Moreau.

Section: Exhibition Highlights
- A curated collection of abstract expressionism and neo-futurist design.
- Bold explorations of color, texture, and unconventional materials.
- Witness the dynamic interplay between emerging and established talents.

Conclusion:
Grand Opening Gala: October 26th, 7 PM. Join us to celebrate the future of art!
    ```

3.  **Output:** Generate a single image of this document

    ```text
    THEME CONCEIVED (ID: 1115): Education and Learning
Document Type: Poster - School Science Fair Project Display Poster (TYPE: Poster - School Science Fair Project Display Poster)

Main Title: Light & Growth

Introduction:
Does light color affect plant growth? We tested red, blue, & natural light.

Section: Our Guess
- Predicted blue light = tallest plants.
- Blue light aids leaf growth.

Section: How We Tested
- 3 bean plant groups.
- Daily height checks, 14 days.

Section: What We Found
- Blue light plants grew most.
- Graph shows full data.

Conclusion:
Blue light boosted growth. Light matters!
    ```
